# CDAC CCEE Learning Portal

> Free, comprehensive study materials for CDAC C-CAT and CCEE exam preparation.

## About This Site

This is a free learning portal containing:
- Comprehensive notes for all CDAC CCEE modules
- Interactive MCQ practice tests (1000+ questions)
- Code examples with syntax highlighting
- Diagrams and visual explanations

## Topics Covered

### Programming Languages
- Java Core (OOP, Collections, Threads, I/O)
- C++ (STL, Memory Management, OOP)
- JavaScript (ES6+, DOM, Node.js)
- C# and ASP.NET

### Web Development
- HTML5, CSS3, Responsive Design
- React.js, Node.js
- Servlets, JSP, Spring Framework

### Database Technologies
- SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL)
- MongoDB (NoSQL)
- Joins, Stored Procedures, Triggers

### Algorithms & Data Structures
- Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues
- Trees, Graphs, Heaps
- Sorting & Searching Algorithms
- Time & Space Complexity

### Operating Systems
- Linux/Unix Commands
- Shell Programming
- Process Management, CPU Scheduling
- Memory Management, Paging
- Deadlock Prevention

### Software Development
- Git Version Control
- SDLC Models (Waterfall, Agile, Scrum)
- DevOps, Docker, Kubernetes
- Software Testing, Selenium, Jenkins

## URL Structure

- Homepage: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/
- Java Notes: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/JavaCore/
- Database Notes: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/Database/
- Web Technologies: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/WebTechnologies/
- OS & SDM: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/OS-SDM/
- C++: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/C++/
- ADS: https://yadnyeshkolte.github.io/cdac-ccee/docs/ADS/
